bibliographic_info.title: Initial Assessment of the BDS-3 PPP-B2b RTS compared with the CNES RTS

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  GPS Solutions (2021) 25:131 https://doi.org/10.1007/s10291-021-01168-1 ORIGINAL ARTICLE Initial Assessment of the BDS‑3 PPP‑B2b RTS compared with the CNES RTS Jun Tao1 · Jingnan Liu2,3 · Zhigang Hu2,3 · Qile Zhao2,3 · Guo Chen2 · Boxiao Ju2 Received: 8 January 2021 / Accepted: 20 July 2021 / Published online: 29 July 2021 This is a U.S.

government work and not under copyright protection in the U.S.; foreign copyright protection may apply 2021 Abstract In 2020, the BeiDou navigation satellite system (BDS) initiated a real-time service (RTS) for precise point positioning (PPP) using the B2b signal for users in China and its surrounding areas.
